subcodes.title: Words to Mr And Mrs W. White from Honolulu, spoken on 1912-10-07
subcodes.first_line: You have taken great trouble. You have come a long way. You are very welcome, exceedingly welcome. How are the friends of God in Honolulu? Are there many there?
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @development of capacity and readiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
